database-object.create:
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[ConveyorLocations]( [Id] [int] NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY NONCLUSTERED, [LogId] [int] NOT NULL, [ProjectId] [int] NOT NULL, [CreatedAt] [datetime2](7) NULL, [LongDate] [datetime2](7) NULL, [Version] [int] NOT NULL, [Name] [nvarchar](255) NOT NULL,
[PosNo] [int] NULL, [Status] [int] NULL ) ON [PRIMARY]
database-object.drop: IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[ConveyorLocations]') AND type in (N'U')) DROP TABLE [dbo].[ConveyorLocations]

database-object.create: CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX [IX_ConveyorLocations_LongDate] ON dbo.[ConveyorLocations] ( LongDate ) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
